# Adawaty

Adawaty is a DFY studio delivering **Brand → Build → Demand** for founders and teams.

This site supports multiple languages via the `?lang=` parameter:
- English: https://adawaty.net/?lang=en
- Français: https://adawaty.net/?lang=fr
- Español: https://adawaty.net/?lang=es
- Deutsch: https://adawaty.net/?lang=de
- مصري (Arabic): https://adawaty.net/?lang=ar

Core pillars (services):
- Brand Intelligence & Positioning: https://adawaty.net/services/brand-intelligence?lang=en
- Brand System (Identity + Assets): https://adawaty.net/services/brand-system?lang=en
- DFY Website Build: https://adawaty.net/services/dfy-website?lang=en
- Content Engine: https://adawaty.net/services/content-engine?lang=en
- Search + AI Visibility (SEO/AEO/LLMSEO): https://adawaty.net/services/ai-visibility?lang=en
- Concierge Partner: https://adawaty.net/services/concierge?lang=en

Solutions (deliverables):
- App Development (Web + Mobile): https://adawaty.net/solutions/app-development?lang=en
- Bio Pages (Personal Brand Hub): https://adawaty.net/solutions/bio-pages?lang=en
- Scheduling + Intake: https://adawaty.net/solutions/scheduling-intake?lang=en
- ERP-lite Workflows: https://adawaty.net/solutions/erp-workflows?lang=en

Persona pages:
- Websites for Lawyers: https://adawaty.net/for/lawyers?lang=en
- Websites for Doctors & Clinics: https://adawaty.net/for/doctors?lang=en
- Systems for Business Owners: https://adawaty.net/for/business-owners?lang=en

AI Visibility Audit:
- https://adawaty.net/ai-visibility-audit?lang=en

Contact:
- https://adawaty.net/contact?lang=en
